channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] FIRE SERVICE → nan : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Petersburg, Sankt-Peterburg, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: FIRE SERVICE / nan. Location: Petersburg, Sankt-Peterburg, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → UKRAINE : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Moscow, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / UKRAINE. Location: Moscow, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] GAZA → JOURNALIST : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: GAZA / JOURNALIST. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 12 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → JOURNALIST : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Los Angeles, California, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / JOURNALIST. Location: Los Angeles, California, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] HAREDI → RABBI : Demonstrate or rally (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: HAREDI / RABBI. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: GERMANY / TURKISH. Location: Rot Am See, Baden-Wüberg, Germany. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Violate ceasefire. Actors: UNITED STATES / IRAN. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 2 sources.
